――ポーションはいかがですか～？ <br>効果絶大、品質保証、売り切れ御免の限定:
How about a potion? Super effective, quality guaranteed, limited
special price while supplies last!♪
大穴探索の必需品、マリナの特製ポーションですよぉ～♪: An essential for exploring the Abyss—Marina's special potion!♪
多くの買い物客が詰めかけた、昼のマーケット。 <br>営業スマイル全開のマリナが:
At the bustling daytime market, crowds of shoppers gathered. Marina
was hawking her potions with her business smile in full force.
マリナさん、今日もポーション１つ、いただけますか？: Marina, could I have a potion today as well?
毎度ありです♪ <br>今後もご贔屓にお願いしますねぇ♪: Thanks as always!♪ I hope you'll continue to be a regular!♪
最前線のこの基地では、ポーションへの需要は多い。 <br>マリナの愛らしい姿もあ:
At this frontline base, potion demand was high. With Marina's
adorable looks, regulars came day after day.
ふう……昼はマーケットでお仕事、夜は夜のお仕事。<br>さすがに忙しいですねぇ…:
Whew... work at the market during the day, work at night... it's really
busy, isn't it...
でもお金は稼げるときにトコトン稼がなくてはっ！<br>お客さまの為に今日も笑顔、:
But I have to earn as much as I can when I can! For my customers,
today I'll keep smiling, smiling! A smile costs nothing, after all!♪
あら、マリナさん！<br>今日も昼間はマーケットで働いてからの出勤なんでしょ？:
Oh, Marina! You worked at the market during the day again before
coming in, didn't you?
はいっ！ 今日はポーションの売れ行きも良くて絶好調ですっ！<br>夜のお仕事もこ:
Yes! Potions sold really well today; it was a great day! I'll keep up
this momentum for tonight's work too!
ホント働き者よね～、マリナさんは。<br>でもウチとしてはとっても助かってるわ。:
You're such a hard worker, Marina. But you're a big help to us. You're
so popular, after all.♪
ええ～～？ 大人気だなんて……そ、そうなのかなぁ～？<br>でも、指名が増えるこ:
Huh? Me? Popular? I wonder if that's true... But honestly, I'm happy
to be getting more requests!♪
出勤早々で申し訳ないんだけど、<br>マリナさん指名の御新規さんの予約が入ってる:
Sorry to bring this up right as you're starting, but there's a
reservation from a new customer who requested you by name.
もちろんですよぉ～。<br>指名してくれるお客さまは大切にしないといけないですし:
Of course! I have to take good care of customers who request me,
after all!♪
（指名料金はお給料に上乗せですからね～♪<br>お昼の仕事と一緒で常連のお得意さ:
(The request fee gets added to my paycheck, after all. Just like with
my day job, I want to steadily increase my regulars!♪)
じゃあ、すぐに着替えてきますね～。<br>お客さまがいらっしゃったらお通ししちゃ:
Okay, I'll go get changed right away. If the customer arrives, please
show them in.
お待たせしました、ご指名いただいたマリナです♪: Sorry to keep you waiting! I'm Marina, the one you requested!♪
客の男はうつむいて、その顔はよく見えない。<br>だが、マリナはその姿にどこか見:
The male customer was looking down, his face not clearly visible. But
Marina felt as if she had seen him somewhere before.
